sglang.title: Fix Phi3 serving which was broke by earlier change

Motivation
Fix Phi3 serving which was broke by earlier change #5724
Benchmark ...
Prefill. latency: 0.02725 s, throughput:  37581.53 token/s
Decode 0. Batch size: 1, latency: 0.00689 s, throughput:    145.24 token/s
Decode 1. Batch size: 1, latency: 0.00675 s, throughput:    148.15 token/s
Decode 2.

sglang.title: [perf] H100 DeepSeek-V3 fused moe tuned config
sglang.author: Alcanderian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Modifications

Checklist

 Format your code according to the Code Formatting with Pre-Commit.
 Add unit tests as outlined in the Running Unit Tests.
 Update documentation / docstrings / example tutorials as needed, according to Writing Documentation.
 Provide throughput / latency benchma

vllm.title: [Core] Gate `prompt_embeds` behind a feature flag
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Since the existence of input_embeds triggers a separate graph compilation, this PR disables prompt_embeds inputs (#15428) by default. This should revert the engine startup time to normal for most users.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix broken Qwen2.5-omni tests
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Use Qwen2.5-omni-3B for test
Fix version comparison so that preview models with transformers 4.52.0.dev0 can also be run.
Correct Qwen2.5-Omni auto_cls to AutoModelForTextToWaveform:

ValueError: Unrecognized configuration class <class 'transformers.models.qwen2_5_omni.configuration_qwen2_5_omni.Qwe

vllm.title: Add full API docs and improve the UX of navigating them
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Changes:

Ported from sphinx.ext.autodoc and sphinx.ext.autosummary to autodoc2:

autodoc2 supports myst (markdown) so we can stop writing rst formatted docstrings
The entire codebase is documented in API Reference
All of these docs can be cross-referenced throughout the docs


Updated the API Refer
